name: Mirror
description: Native planar-reflection mirror blocks for Minecraft 26.2 (Fabric). Core has no hard dependencies; optional in-game settings via Mod Menu + Cloth Config.

custom.mirror:notes: Compatible with Sodium: the reflection re-render drives Sodium's own terrain culling through LevelExtractor.extract, so mirrors show correctly culled terrain and the main view is unaffected. Iris is not supported (it replaces the render pipeline the reflection pass re-enters).
